title: Celebrating Excellence: Utkarsh 2024 at Infosys Noida DC
description: A vibrant celebration of art and intellect at the heart of corporate excellence. The Utkarsh 2024 Kavi Sammelan brought together a brilliant lineup of contemporary poets, filling the Infosys Noida DC arena with sharp wit, profound philosophy, and unforgettable verses. A beautiful evening where corporate synergy met the timeless magic of the spoken word.
